facade_detail.composition: The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 2 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its converted house-form, row typology.

facade_description: Two-storey converted row house in brick with a cross-gable roof, set back approximately 3 metres from the street. The ground floor is occupied by an active commercial storefront (Chocolate Addict / Mare Pizzeria signage observed). Two double-hung sash windows are visible on the second floor above the shopfront. No dedicated photo observations are available for this address; description relies on database records and typology defaults.
